hero.subtitle: The finest artisan ice creams in Vallès, crafted daily with top-quality natural ingredients

about.sectionSubtitle: Discover the story behind the finest artisan ice creams in Vallès
about.hist1: Cafeteria Gelateria Iseo was born from a passion for creating sweet and special moments in the heart of Caldes de Montbui. Since the beginning, we have kept the artisan essence in every one of our products.
about.hist2: Our ice creams are made daily with fresh, natural ingredients, following traditional recipes that guarantee the creamy texture and authentic flavours that define us.
about.hist3: Besides our ice creams, we offer a carefully curated selection of top-quality coffees, homemade crêpes, fresh sandwiches and pastries baked each morning in our workshop.
about.valor1Desc: Every ice cream is crafted daily with dedication, following traditional recipes perfected over the years
about.valor2Desc: We only use top-quality natural and local ingredients, with no artificial preservatives
about.valor3Desc: More than ten years serving the people of Caldes de Montbui with the same enthusiasm as day one
about.comprDesc: We are committed to maintaining the highest quality in all our products, using only natural and fresh ingredients. Our customers' satisfaction is our greatest reward, and every day we work to exceed their expectations with outstanding products and warm, personal service.

products.sectionSubtitle: Products crafted daily with fresh, natural ingredients

gelats.sectionSubtitle: Time-honoured artisan recipes, made every day in our workshop. Come to the display and choose one!
gelats.sectionNota: Ice creams are only available during the season from March to September
gelats.blocTitle: Want to make sure of your favourite flavour?
gelats.blocSubtitle: Reserve a tub and take home your favourite flavour or flavours!
gelats.hintMida: Please select the tub size first
gelats.waMsg: Hello! I'd like to reserve a {{mida}} tub with: {{gustos}}.

location.sectionSubtitle: Come and discover us in the centre of Caldes de Montbui
location.mapInstruction: Click the map to open directions
location.notaText: Opening hours may vary during local holidays and summer. Contact us to confirm opening on special dates.
location.cotxeDesc: Parking in the town centre. Easy access from the C-59 road.
location.busDesc: Regular bus services from Barcelona and Vic. Stop 2 minutes' walk away.
location.peuDesc: Located on the main avenue of Caldes de Montbui, near all local services.

footer.desc: The finest artisan ice creams and quality coffees in the heart of Caldes de Montbui. Come and discover unique flavours crafted with passion.
footer.socialPrompt: Follow us on social media to stay up to date!
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Cafeteria Gelateria ISEO. All rights reserved.

avisLegal.title: Legal Notice
avisLegal.s1p: In accordance with Article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce, we inform you that:
avisLegal.s2p1: This legal notice governs the use of the website "caffeiseo.netlify.app" (hereinafter, the Website), owned by Cafeteria Gelateria Iseo.
avisLegal.s2p2: Browsing the Website assigns you the status of user and implies full and unreserved acceptance of all provisions included in this Legal Notice.
avisLegal.s3p1: The user undertakes to use the Website, its content and services in accordance with the law, this Legal Notice, good customs and public order.
avisLegal.s3p2: The use of the Website for unlawful or harmful purposes, or that may in any way cause damage or prevent the normal functioning of the Website, is prohibited.
avisLegal.s4p: All content on the Website, including without limitation texts, photographs, graphics, images, icons, technology, software, as well as graphic design and source codes, constitutes a work owned by Cafeteria Gelateria Iseo, and no exploitation rights recognised by current intellectual property regulations are deemed to have been transferred to the user.
avisLegal.s5p: Cafeteria Gelateria ISEO is not liable for damages arising from interference, omissions, interruptions, computer viruses, telephone breakdowns or disconnections in the operational functioning of the electronic system, caused by reasons beyond its control.
avisLegal.s6p: These General Conditions are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute relating to the application, interpretation and compliance with these General Conditions, the parties submit, with express waiver of any other jurisdiction, to the Courts and Tribunals of Barcelona.

privacitat.title: Privacy Policy
privacitat.s1p: The data controller for personal data collected through the Website is Cafeteria Gelateria Iseo, with address at Avinguda Pi i Margall 82, Caldes de Montbui, Barcelona.
privacitat.s2p: The personal data you provide will be processed for the following purposes:
privacitat.s2li2: Sending commercial communications (only with your prior consent)
privacitat.s3p: The legal basis for processing your data is:
privacitat.s3li1: The consent of the data subject
privacitat.s3li2: The performance of a contract to which the data subject is party
privacitat.s3li3: Compliance with legal obligations applicable to the controller
privacitat.s3li4: The legitimate interest of the controller
privacitat.s4p: Personal data will be retained for as long as the business relationship is maintained or for the years necessary to comply with legal obligations. After this period, data will be deleted or anonymised.
privacitat.s5p: Your data will not be transferred to third parties, except as legally required. Where necessary for the provision of services, data may be communicated to service providers acting as data processors, with whom the corresponding confidentiality and data processing agreements have been signed.
privacitat.s6p: You may exercise the following rights:
privacitat.s6liAcces: Right of access: Know what data we hold about you
privacitat.s6liRect: Right of rectification: Correct inaccurate data
privacitat.s6liSupr: Right of erasure: Request deletion of your data
privacitat.s6liLimit: Right to restriction: Limit the processing of your data
privacitat.s6liPort: Right to portability: Receive your data in a structured format
privacitat.s6liOp: Right to object: Object to the processing of your data
privacitat.s6contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at: caffeiseo@yahoo.it
privacitat.s6aepd: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).
privacitat.s7p: We have adopted the necessary technical and organisational measures to ensure the security and integrity of the personal data we process, as well as to prevent its loss, alteration and/or access by unauthorised third parties.
privacitat.s8p: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy to adapt it to legislative, jurisprudential or industry practice developments. In such cases, the new version will be published on this page.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1p: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to website owners.
cookies.s21p: These allow the user to navigate the website and use the different options or services available. For example, controlling traffic and data communication, identifying the session, etc.
cookies.s22p: These allow the user to access the service with some general characteristics predefined according to a series of criteria on the user's terminal (language, browser type, etc.).
cookies.s23p: These allow the number of users to be quantified and thus carry out statistical analysis of the use users make of the service. For this purpose, your browsing on our website is analysed in order to improve the range of products or services we offer.
cookies.s24p: These allow the advertising spaces on the website to be managed as efficiently as possible, adapting the content of the advertisement to the content of the service requested.
cookies.s4p1: You can allow, block or delete cookies installed on your device through your browser settings:
cookies.s4liChrome: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies
cookies.s4liEdge: Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions
cookies.s4p2: If you disable cookies, some website features may not be available.
cookies.s5p: This website uses third-party services to collect information for statistical and usage purposes. Specifically, Google Analytics is used to analyse website statistics.
cookies.s5p2: You can find more information about Google Analytics cookies at
cookies.s6p1: By accessing this website and to improve your service, our own and third-party cookies will be used. If you continue browsing, we understand that you accept our Cookie Policy.
cookies.s6p2: However, you can change cookie settings at any time.
cookies.s7p: This Cookie Policy may be modified in response to new legislative, regulatory requirements, or in order to adapt this policy to the instructions issued by the Spanish Data Protection Agency.
